goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 13:45' and should leave on 'friday'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'ely'.
Make sure you get 'price'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'lebanese' food and should be in the 'centre'.
The restaurant should be in the 'moderate' price range.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 13:45 and should leave on friday
The train should depart from cambridge and should go to ely
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve lebanese food and should be in the centre
The restaurant should be in the moderate price range
Make sure you get postcode and address
